zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury De Montfort VI於1192年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利時，他的父親Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV17歲，母親Alix de Montmorency18歲。他和Beatrix of Viennois至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1241年在義大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托奧特朗托享年49歲，埋葬在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amaury De Montfort VI于1192年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利时，他的父亲Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV17岁，母亲Alix de Montmorency18岁。他和Beatrix of Viennois至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1241年在意大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托奧特朗托享年49岁，埋葬在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury De Montfort VI was born in 1192, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, was 17 and his mother, Alix de Montmorency, was 18. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Beatrix of Viennois. He died in 1241, in Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italy, at the age of 49, and was buried in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury De Montfort VI est né en 1192, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Alix de Montmorency, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Beatrix of Viennois. Il est décédé en 1241, à Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italie, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury De Montfort VI 1192 in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV 17 und seine Mutter Alix de Montmorency 18. Er hatte mit Beatrix of Viennois mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1241 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italien und wurde in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury De Montfort VI è nato il nel 1192 nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Alix de Montmorency, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Beatrix of Viennois. Morì nel 1241, nel Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury De Montfort VIが1192年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで生まれた時，父Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IVは17歳，母Alix de Montmorencyは18歳であった。彼はBeatrix of Viennoisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1241年にイタリアプウグリアテラ ド'オトラントーオトラントーで49歳で死去し，イタリアラズオロマロマにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury De Montfort VI(이)가 1192년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Alix de Montmorency(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Beatrix of Viennois(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 이탈리아 푸그리야 터라 드'트랜토 트랜토에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amaury De Montfort VI nasceu em 1192, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Montmorency, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Beatrix of Viennois. Ele faleceu em 1241, em Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Itália, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury De Montfort VI родился в 1192 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Montmorency, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Beatrix of Viennois. Он умер в 1241 г. в местности отранто, тирра д'отранто, пугля, Италия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amaury De Montfort VI nació en 1192, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Simon de Montfort l'Amaury IV, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Alix de Montmorency, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Beatrix of Viennois. Murió en 1241, en Otranto, Terra d'Otranto, Puglia, Italia, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.
